{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032205331351204D5E40ED8B965DC7\"}"},"total":4532},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7012987874883388174","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感觉很不错，刚开始读的时候就完结了，剧情丰富，不缺乏搞笑，主角身边总会有一下奇葩的人；完结部分和平安心，但是顾老的离开还是有些不舒服，看完后觉得很不错，喜欢末世类型的家人们我推荐一下，看完顺便给个五星吧."},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1632838484,"group_id":"6832180376857742343","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzhC1XIp0ZMzdkmnSRaxgKrviquwiBzESceQlSDnauDF","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8308c84791e3434584631dbb53729119~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776701963\u0026x-signature=qWGJ2aolVYZfe1kJm6XUcmXbM6s%3D","user_id":"3218977293606695","user_name":"君眧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3218977293606695","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6832180376857742343","book_info":{"abstract":"末世开启，进化，就是唯一的主色调。重生一世，居然变成了丧尸。不过拥有系统的庄翎无所畏惧。只要能进化，丧尸又如何？力量、速度、精神力，你的天赋如何？不好意思，庄翎全要了！明明是救世主的剧本，却放在了一只丧尸的身上。......可当庄翎见到破碎之地、灵界之时，才明白原来这个世界是如此神秘！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/796226e7c285ddccfa991956ecdc0102","author":"一份烤鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"6832180376857742343","book_name":"末世：从丧尸开始进化","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4034人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":8,\"name\":\"科幻末世\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8\u0026name=科幻末世\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":36,\"name\":\"重生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36\u0026name=重生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":19,\"name\":\"系统\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19\u0026name=系统\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":68,\"name\":\"末世\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68\u0026name=末世\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":658,\"name\":\"天灾\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658\u0026name=天灾\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":869,\"name\":\"废土\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=869\u0026name=废土\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6832180815036678660","read_count":"4034","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1305049"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"597","tags":"科幻末世,系统,重生,末世,天灾,废土","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/1000200010688015c119a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779312793\u0026x-signature=XfXlXJqtn22qXNDupxkSlkMKESI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"135972529377112","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.16709819e+08"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032205331351204D5E40ED8B965DC7\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读32小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":116709,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":10875},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6990324403850642216","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{}
